## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] Existing behavior is unchanged, or breaking changes are documented
- [ ] `version` in `package.json` is bumped if this should publish to npm (patch / minor / major)
- [ ] If this is a new integration: a row has been added to the integration table in `integration-core`'s README
